title: Chucklin's FNaF Pack
description: A simple pack of random blocks, decor, items, and much more! (inspired by Management Wanted by OVDR Studios)
body:
Chucklin's FNaF Pack!
NEEDS GECKOLIB!!!

This is a simple mod I made a couple days ago that contains

-Over 100+ blocks including a ton of walls, floors, and more!
-Lots of decor from tables, chairs, skytubes, and more!
-Lots of doors for whatever build you may need!

(also please don't port this to bedrock.)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
also thank all of you for getting this mod around 10000+ downloads!(on curseforge)
